violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Facility has not had a serve safe person for a long time.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee changing tasks/working with raw meat and changing gloves without washing hands.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Containers of taco shells in the kitchen in the food prep area are not covered.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dish washer is at 0 ppm and unable to get sanitizer cycle working. Must sanitize in the 3 comp sink until it's fixed.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates on the counter in the food prep area were not inverted.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -No serve safe person.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee doing food prep never washed hands during the inspection. Changed gloves and tasks several times.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. - Taco and burrito shells on the top shelf uncovered.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Several large containers of cooked meat in the walk in cooler not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Blade on the large can opener is extremely dirty.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Areas around the fans in the walk in cooler have black debris on it. Drain pipe from the condensation unit is dusty.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Ansul system has grease dripping off of it.

Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. -Stacks of clean plates on the cook line not inverted.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Handwash sink in the kitchen had a bucket in it and was completely blocked at the beginning of the inspection.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Rubbing alcohol and other chemicals on a shelf above large containers of tortilla chips with the lids cracked open.
